imweb_operational.freshness_note: fresh 기준. 그래도 외부 전송 전에는 최신성 재확인이 필요하다.

window.timezone_note: operational order paidAt filter uses KST day boundaries converted to timestamptz. This avoids excluding KST orders that are still previous-day UTC.

summary.excluded_signal_only_policy: NPay click/count/payment start-only signals are not read from operational orders and are excluded by construction; only payment-complete Imweb order rows are included.
